mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , UMA.WORK_MONTH , UMA.WORK_DAYS , UMA.LATE_COUNT , UMA.ABSENT_DAYS , UMA.DEPT_NM , UMA.JBGD_NM FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE AS ( SELECT DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT D.DEPT_ID, D.UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN DEPT_TREE DT ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = DT.DEPT_ID ) SELECT DEPT_ID FROM DEPT_TREE ) D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_MONTHLY_ATTENDANCE UMA ON U.USER_ID = UMA.USER_ID AND UMA.WORK_MONTH = #{workMonth} WHERE D.DEPT_ID IS NOT NULL AND U.RSGNTN_YN = 'N' ORDER BY UMA.ABSENT_DAYS DESC , UMA.LATE_COUNT DESC

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , U.DEPT_ID , #{workMonth} AS WORK_MONTH , CAST(COUNT(T.WORK_YMD) AS INTEGER) AS WORK_DAYS , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(T.WORK_HR, ''), '0')::INTEGER), 0) AS INTEGER) AS TOTAL_WORK_HR , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.LATE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS LATE_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.EARLY_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS EARLY_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.OVERTIME_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS OVERTIME_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(T.OVERTIME_HR, ''), '0')::INTEGER), 0) AS INTEGER) AS TOTAL_OVERTIME_HR , 0 AS ABSENT_DAYS , D.DEPT_NM , J.JBGD_NM FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN JOB_GRADE J ON U.JBGD_CD = J.JBGD_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID AND TO_CHAR(T.WORK_YMD, 'YYYY-MM') = #{workMonth} WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , U.DEPT_ID , D.DEPT_NM , J.JBGD_NM
